name: StableEnrich
description: Pay-per-request access to Apollo, Clado, Exa, Firecrawl, Google Maps, Serper, Whitepages, Hunter, Minerva, Reddit, and Influencer APIs. No auth, no subscriptions - instant access via x402.

endpoints.description: Apollo Organization Enrichment - Enrich single company by domain
Apollo Organization Search - Find companies by filters
Apollo People Enrichment - Enrich single person by email/name/domain
Apollo People Search - Find prospects by filters
Clado Contacts Enrichment - Enrich contact info from LinkedIn URL, email, or phone
Cloudflare Browser Rendering Crawl - Start a crawl job with robots.txt support and pattern-based URL filtering
Exa Answer - Get AI-generated answers with citations
Exa Contents - Retrieve content from URLs
Exa Find Similar - Find pages similar to a given URL
Exa Search - Neural search across the web
Firecrawl Scrape - Scrape a URL with full JavaScript rendering. Use as fallback when WebFetch returns empty/JS-only content or 403s
Firecrawl Search - Search the web with JS rendering
Google Maps Nearby Search (Full) - Complete place data including reviews and photos
Google Maps Nearby Search (Partial) - Basic place data only
Google Maps Place Details (Full) - Complete place information
Google Maps Place Details (Partial) - Basic place information
Google Maps Text Search (Full) - Complete search results with details
Google Maps Text Search (Partial) - Basic search results
Hunter Email Verifier - Verify email deliverability and validity
Influencer Enrich by Email - Find social media profiles associated with an email address
Influencer Enrich by Social - Enrich social media profile with additional data including contact info
Minerva Enrich - Enrich person records with demographics, work history, education, contact info, addresses, and financial signals. Supports lookup by Minerva PID, LinkedIn URL, or name/email/phone
Minerva Resolve - Resolve person identity to a Minerva PID and LinkedIn URL. Supports fuzzy matching and reverse lookup by email or phone
Minerva Validate Emails - Check if email addresses exist in the Minerva database and retrieve validation status and last seen timestamps
Reddit Post Comments - Get post details and comments
Reddit Search - Search Reddit posts
Serper Google News Search - Search Google News with AI-optimized results
Serper Google Shopping Search - Search Google Shopping with product data
Whitepages Person Search - Find people by name, phone, or address
Whitepages Property Search - Get property ownership and resident data

note: StableEnrich aggregates 10+ premium data APIs into a single x402 endpoint. All APIs accessible without API keys or subscriptions - pay only for what you use. Includes: Apollo (B2B data), Clado (LinkedIn enrichment), Exa (neural search), Firecrawl (web scraping), Google Maps (place data), Serper (Google search), Hunter (email verification), Minerva (people data), Influencer (social profiles), Reddit (discussions), Whitepages (people/property lookup), and Cloudflare (browser rendering).
